ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Continued To Jun-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Mezzetti, via Zoom, for Robert Mezzetti, Petitioner.

Counsel reports that one of the Beneficiaries has passed away with no instructions and accordingly he may need to file a Petition for Instructions. The court advises counsel that ideally, he would have filed a Petition to Approve Status of Administration to update the court, prior to today's hearing.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file either a Petition for Instructions or a Petition to Approve Status of Administration by the next hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 12, 2012 is admitted to probate. Robert L. Mezzetti, II is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 13, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
